text.title: scope-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for scope-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Verbal scope agreements without written scope statement sign-off.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Undocumented promises are interpreted differently by each party. At project end, everyone argues about what was supposed to be built based on their memory.

failure-mode.description: Vague scope language: "make it better", "improve performance".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vague scope cannot be accepted, rejected, or measured. Every acceptance criterion must have a numeric or observable condition.
